steps.title: Factor and apply absolute value property
steps.content:
Recognize that $6x - 6 = 6(x-1)$:
$$|6(x-1)| = 150$$
Apply the property for absolute values to get:
$$6|x-1| = 150$$

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: From $|x-1| = 25$, we have two cases: $x - 1 = 25$ or $x - 1 = -25$. The positive value of $x - 1$ is $25$.
